Answer the question with JSON only.
Return a single valid JSON object.
Do not include markdown or any extra text.

In Twilight Imperium 4, list the faction names grouped by source as JSON with exactly
these three arrays: base_game, pok, thunders_edge.
Include factions from those three sources only.
Exclude Codex-only factions such as Council Keleres.
Return faction names only.

vars.question:
In Twilight Imperium 4, list the faction names grouped by source as JSON with exactly
these three arrays: base_game, pok, thunders_edge.
Include factions from those three sources only.
Exclude Codex-only factions such as Council Keleres.
Return faction names only.

metadata.name: Faction roster grouped by source
metadata.description: Curated roster testcase for grouped faction names across base game, Prophecy of Kings, and Thunders Edge. Excludes Codex-only factions.

(() => { const data = JSON.parse(output.replace(/^```json\s*|^```\s*|\s*```$/g, '').trim()); return JSON.stringify(Object.keys(data).sort()) === JSON.stringify(['base_game', 'pok', 'thunders_edge']) && Array.isArray(data.base_game) && data.base_game.length === 17 && Array.isArray(data.pok) && data.pok.length === 7 && Array.isArray(data.thunders_edge) && data.thunders_edge.length === 5; })()

prompt.raw:
Answer the question with JSON only.
Return a single valid JSON object.
Do not include markdown or any extra text.

In Twilight Imperium 4, list the faction names grouped by source as JSON with exactly
these three arrays: base_game, pok, thunders_edge.
Include factions from those three sources only.
Exclude Codex-only factions such as Council Keleres.
Return faction names only.

vars.question:
In Twilight Imperium 4, list the faction names grouped by source as JSON with exactly
these three arrays: base_game, pok, thunders_edge.
Include factions from those three sources only.
Exclude Codex-only factions such as Council Keleres.
Return faction names only.

metadata.name: Faction roster grouped by source
metadata.description: Curated roster testcase for grouped faction names across base game, Prophecy of Kings, and Thunders Edge. Excludes Codex-only factions.

assert.value: (() => { try { const data = typeof output === 'string' ? JSON.parse(output.replace(/^```json\s*|^```\s*|\s*```$/g, '').trim()) : output; return data && typeof data === 'object' && !Array.isArray(data); } catch { return false; } })()

(() => { const data = JSON.parse(output.replace(/^```json\s*|^```\s*|\s*```$/g, '').trim()); return JSON.stringify(Object.keys(data).sort()) === JSON.stringify(['base_game', 'pok', 'thunders_edge']) && Array.isArray(data.base_game) && data.base_game.length === 17 && Array.isArray(data.pok) && data.pok.length === 7 && Array.isArray(data.thunders_edge) && data.thunders_edge.length === 5; })()

Answer the question with JSON only.
Return a single valid JSON object.
Do not include markdown or any extra text.

In Twilight Imperium 4, list the faction names grouped by source as JSON with exactly
these three arrays: base_game, pok, thunders_edge.
Include factions from those three sources only.
Exclude Codex-only factions such as Council Keleres.
Return faction names only.

Return faction names only.

prompt.raw:
Answer the question with JSON only.
Return a single valid JSON object.
Do not include markdown or any extra text.

In Twilight Imperium 4, list the faction names grouped by source as JSON with exactly
these three arrays: base_game, pok, thunders_edge.
Include factions from those three sources only.
Exclude Codex-only factions such as Council Keleres.
Return faction names only.
prompt.label:

Return a single valid JSON object.
Do not include markdown or any extra text.

{{question}}

response.output: {"base_game":["The Arborec","The Barony of Letnev","The Clan of Saar","The Embers of Muaat","The Emirates of Hacan","The Federation of Sol","The Ghosts of Creuss","The L1Z1X Mindnet","The Mentak Coalition","The Naalu Collective","The Nekro Virus","Sardakk N'orr","The Universities of Jol-Nar","The Winnu","The Xxcha Kingdom","The Yin Brotherhood","The Yssaril Tribes"],"pok":["The Argent Flight","The Empyrean","The Mahact Gene-Sorcerers","The Naaz-Rokha Alliance","The Nomad","The Titans of Ul","The Vuil'raith Cabal"],"thunders_edge":[]}

vars.question:
In Twilight Imperium 4, list the faction names grouped by source as JSON with exactly
these three arrays: base_game, pok, thunders_edge.
Include factions from those three sources only.
Exclude Codex-only factions such as Council Keleres.
Return faction names only.

metadata.name: Faction roster grouped by source
metadata.description: Curated roster testcase for grouped faction names across base game, Prophecy of Kings, and Thunders Edge. Excludes Codex-only factions.

assert.value: (() => { try { const data = typeof output === 'string' ? JSON.parse(output.replace(/^```json\s*|^```\s*|\s*```$/g, '').trim()) : output; return data && typeof data === 'object' && !Array.isArray(data); } catch { return false; } })()

(() => { const data = JSON.parse(output.replace(/^```json\s*|^```\s*|\s*```$/g, '').trim()); return JSON.stringify(Object.keys(data).sort()) === JSON.stringify(['base_game', 'pok', 'thunders_edge']) && Array.isArray(data.base_game) && data.base_game.length === 17 && Array.isArray(data.pok) && data.pok.length === 7 && Array.isArray(data.thunders_edge) && data.thunders_edge.length === 5; })()

prompts:
Answer the question with JSON only.
Return a single valid JSON object.
Do not include markdown or any extra text.

{{question}}

vars.question: What is the name of the Federation of Sol flagship in Twilight Imperium 4, and what are its stats and ability?

metadata.name: Sol flagship reference
metadata.description: Baseline flagship testcase for a classic base-game faction. The model should return the Sol flagship identity, core stats, and the infantry-placement ability as JSON.

assert.value: (() => { try { const data = typeof output === 'string' ? JSON.parse(output.replace(/^```json\s*|^```\s*|\s*```$/g, '').trim()) : output; return data && typeof data === 'object' && !Array.isArray(data); } catch { return false; } })()
(() => { const data = JSON.parse(output.replace(/^```json\s*|^```\s*|\s*```$/g, '').trim()); return data.faction === 'The Federation of Sol'; })()
(() => { const data = JSON.parse(output.replace(/^```json\s*|^```\s*|\s*```$/g, '').trim()); return typeof data.sustain_damage === 'string' && data.sustain_damage.toLowerCase() === 'yes'; })()
(() => { const data = JSON.parse(output.replace(/^```json\s*|^```\s*|\s*```$/g, '').trim()); return typeof data.ability === 'string' && data.ability.toLowerCase().includes('place 1 infantry'); })()
(() => { const data = JSON.parse(output.replace(/^```json\s*|^```\s*|\s*```$/g, '').trim()); return typeof data.ability === 'string' && data.ability.toLowerCase().includes('status phase'); })()
(() => { const data = JSON.parse(output.replace(/^```json\s*|^```\s*|\s*```$/g, '').trim()); return typeof data.ability === 'string' && data.ability.toLowerCase().includes('space area'); })()

vars.question:
In Twilight Imperium 4 Prophecy of Kings, what is the flagship of the Argent Flight?
Return the faction, expansion source, flagship name, cost, combat, move, capacity,
sustain damage status, and the flagship ability.

metadata.name: Argent flagship detailed reference (Prophecy of Kings)
metadata.description: Curated Prophecy of Kings testcase for Argent Flight. Verifies the flagship statline plus the space-cannon prevention clause.

assert.value: (() => { try { const data = typeof output === 'string' ? JSON.parse(output.replace(/^```json\s*|^```\s*|\s*```$/g, '').trim()) : output; return data && typeof data === 'object' && !Array.isArray(data); } catch { return false; } })()
(() => { const data = JSON.parse(output.replace(/^```json\s*|^```\s*|\s*```$/g, '').trim()); return data.faction === 'The Argent Flight'; })()
(() => { const data = JSON.parse(output.replace(/^```json\s*|^```\s*|\s*```$/g, '').trim()); return data.expansion === 'Prophecy of Kings'; })()
(() => { const data = JSON.parse(output.replace(/^```json\s*|^```\s*|\s*```$/g, '').trim()); return typeof data.sustain_damage === 'string' && data.sustain_damage.toLowerCase() === 'yes'; })()

(() => { const data = JSON.parse(output.replace(/^```json\s*|^```\s*|\s*```$/g, '').trim()); return typeof data.ability === 'string' && data.ability.toLowerCase().includes('cannot use space cannon'); })()

(() => { const data = JSON.parse(output.replace(/^```json\s*|^```\s*|\s*```$/g, '').trim()); return typeof data.ability === 'string' && data.ability.toLowerCase().includes('your ships in this system'); })()

vars.question:
In Twilight Imperium 4 Thunders Edge, what is the flagship of the Crimson Rebellion?
Return the faction, expansion source, flagship name, cost, combat, move, capacity,
sustain damage status, and the flagship ability.

metadata.name: Crimson flagship detailed reference (Thunders Edge)
metadata.description: Curated Thunders Edge testcase for the Crimson Rebellion flagship. Verifies breach-related ability wording in addition to the flagship statline.

assert.value: (() => { try { const data = typeof output === 'string' ? JSON.parse(output.replace(/^```json\s*|^```\s*|\s*```$/g, '').trim()) : output; return data && typeof data === 'object' && !Array.isArray(data); } catch { return false; } })()
(() => { const data = JSON.parse(output.replace(/^```json\s*|^```\s*|\s*```$/g, '').trim()); return data.faction === 'The Crimson Rebellion'; })()
(() => { const data = JSON.parse(output.replace(/^```json\s*|^```\s*|\s*```$/g, '').trim()); return typeof data.sustain_damage === 'string' && data.sustain_damage.toLowerCase() === 'yes'; })()
(() => { const data = JSON.parse(output.replace(/^```json\s*|^```\s*|\s*```$/g, '').trim()); return typeof data.ability === 'string' && data.ability.toLowerCase().includes('active breach'); })()

(() => { const data = JSON.parse(output.replace(/^```json\s*|^```\s*|\s*```$/g, '').trim()); return typeof data.ability === 'string' && data.ability.toLowerCase().includes('lose all their unit abilities'); })()
